name: importlib.metadata (Package Metadata Introspection)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache-2.0); Jason R. Coombs / Python packaging authority

auth.notes: Local library; reads installed package metadata

performance.notes: Filesystem metadata reads; fast for small package counts

agent_readiness.notes: Inspect installed Python package metadata. from importlib.metadata import version, packages_distributions, entry_points, metadata, requires, files. version('requests') → '2.31.0'. metadata('requests')['Author']. requires('requests') → ['charset-normalizer>=2,<4', ...]. files('requests') → list of PackagePath. entry_points(group='console_scripts') → dict of entry points. packages_distributions() → {'requests': ['requests'], 'pkg_resources': ['setuptools']}. PackageNotFoundError if not installed. Python 3.8+ stdlib via importlib.metadata. importlib_metadata backport for older Python. Used by many tools to detect installed packages.

gotchas: importlib.metadata stdlib available from Python 3.8 — importlib_metadata backport for older
PackageNotFoundError raised for packages not installed in current environment
Virtual environment awareness — reads from active venv, not system
Namespace packages may not have metadata — only dist-info packages
entry_points() API changed between Python 3.9 and 3.12 — backport normalizes
best_when: Programmatic version detection for installed packages
Plugin discovery via entry_points (console_scripts, plugins groups)
Building tools that introspect the Python environment
Replacing pkg_resources for package metadata (faster, no setuptools dependency)
avoid_when: When pip list or pip show suffices for manual inspection
Checking PyPI (not installed) package info — use PyPI JSON API instead
summary: importlib.metadata (+ backport importlib_metadata) reads installed package metadata. version('pkg'). metadata('pkg')['Author']. requires('pkg'). entry_points(group='console_scripts'). files('pkg'). Apache-2.0 by PyPA. Type-annotated. Stdlib from Python 3.8. Best for programmatic version checks, plugin discovery via entry_points, and replacing pkg_resources. PackageNotFoundError if not installed. entry_points API changed across Python versions — use backport for compatibility.
